title: DPYD / capecitabine
summary: Both variants of rs1801159 are assigned normal function by CPIC. Patients with the CC genotype and cancer who are treated with capecitabine, a fluoropyrimidine-based chemotherapy, may not have altered risk of drug toxicity as compared to patients with the CT or TT genotype. However, conflicting evidence has been reported. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence risk of drug toxicity.
